chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2770 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.12543/2025 3. For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 Mr. Akhtar Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
